title: Statistical Learning
description: Foundations of statistical learning theory including regression, classification, and resampling methods.

title: Advanced Machine Learning
description: Deep dive into ensemble methods, kernel methods, and model selection for supervised learning.

title: Deep Learning
description: Neural network architectures including CNNs, RNNs, and transformers, with hands-on PyTorch labs.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Text representation, sequence models, and modern large language model techniques.

title: Computer Vision
description: Image classification, object detection, and segmentation using convolutional and transformer models.

title: Reinforcement Learning
description: Markov decision processes, value and policy iteration, deep RL algorithms.

title: Bayesian Statistics
description: Bayesian inference, MCMC methods, and probabilistic programming.

title: Time Series Analysis
description: ARIMA, state-space models, and forecasting techniques for sequential data.

title: Causal Inference
description: Potential outcomes framework, causal graphs, and treatment effect estimation.

title: Big Data Systems
description: Distributed storage and compute with Spark and Hadoop ecosystems.

title: Cloud Computing for Data Science
description: Deploying data pipelines and ML models on cloud infrastructure (GCP/AWS).

title: Database Systems
description: Relational and NoSQL database design, query optimisation, and transactions.

title: Data Engineering Pipelines
description: ETL/ELT pipeline design, orchestration, and data quality monitoring.

title: MLOps
description: Model versioning, CI/CD for ML, monitoring, and reproducibility.

title: Linear Algebra for Data Science
description: Vector spaces, eigendecomposition, and matrix factorisation for ML applications.

title: Optimisation Methods
description: Convex optimisation, gradient-based methods, and applications to ML training.

title: Probability Theory
description: Measure-theoretic probability foundations for statistical modelling.

title: Numerical Methods
description: Numerical linear algebra, differentiation, and integration for scientific computing.

title: Data Visualisation
description: Principles of visual encoding and interactive dashboard design.

title: Human-Computer Interaction for Data
description: Designing usable interfaces for data-driven decision tools.

title: Data Ethics and Privacy
description: Fairness, accountability, transparency, and privacy-preserving data methods.

title: Responsible AI
description: Bias detection, model interpretability, and governance for AI systems.

title: Graph Neural Networks
description: Representation learning on graph-structured data.

title: Recommender Systems
description: Collaborative filtering, matrix factorisation, and deep recommender architectures.

title: Anomaly Detection
description: Statistical and deep learning approaches to outlier and fraud detection.

title: Speech and Audio Processing
description: Signal processing and deep learning for speech recognition and synthesis.

title: Research Seminar in Data Science
description: Student-led presentations on current data science research papers.

title: Industry Project Lab
description: Applied group project with an industry or research partner.

title: Master's Thesis Preparation
description: Literature review and proposal development for the master's thesis.

title: Master's Thesis
description: Independent research culminating in a written thesis and defence.
